description: A release build strips symbols and panic messages, so a WASM trap surfaces as a bare 'unreachable' with no source location.
body: Failure mode: the build strips debug info and disables panic messages, so when the module hits a trap (unreachable, out-of-bounds access) the only signal is an opaque 'unreachable executed' with no stack or source line, making the incident undiagnosable. Detection signals: production errors show only a bare WASM trap; no panic message or source mapping; a crash that cannot be traced to a line. Do not ship a build whose sole crash signal is 'unreachable'. Safer fallback: install a panic hook so panics print a message and stack, build dev with DWARF/source maps, and retain a symbol map for release so a deployed crash can be symbolized back to source.
